summary: VAL-API-003 assertion confirmed. ConfigGet returns value and source file (settings.json or settings.local.json). ConfigSet persists only to settings.local.json, never modifying settings.json (verified via checksum comparison before/after). All 9 config-related tests passed.

keyTestsValidated.validates: ConfigGet { key } returns the current config value and the source file it was loaded from
keyTestsValidated.verification: Test asserts that source_file is Some and contains 'settings.json'

keyTestsValidated.validates: ConfigSet persists only to settings.local.json, never modifying settings.json
keyTestsValidated.verification: Test calculates checksum of settings.json before ConfigSet, then verifies checksum is unchanged after, and that settings.local.json contains the new key/value
